title: Assistant Store Manager - Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Assistant Store Manager with drive and ambition, Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates in Kolkata is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates:
Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pizza Hut India Asia Pacific Associates!
